name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi25_3_abatement_costs
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi25_3_abatement_costs' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`KPI_2XRT_Timer_hr` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`KPI_2XRT_Timer_hr` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'createddate_time|duedate_time|completeddate_time|createddate|duedate|completeddate|completedstatus|KPI_TwiceDueDate|KPI_Add10_BusDays|KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate|KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type|KPI_Assessment_Date|Date|KPI_Assessment_Date_time|KPI_2XRT_Timer_hr' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi25_3_abatement_costs`

error.message:
